mapper.select: SELECT id, stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, source, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY paper ASC

SELECT id, stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, source, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND is_active = 1
AND ( paper LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR prompt_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY paper ASC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND is_active = 1
AND ( paper LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR prompt_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT id, stage_id, paper, title, prompt_text, source, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM essay_prompt WHERE stage_id = #{stageId} AND paper = #{paper} LIMIT 1
